Always update the README.md file whenever a change is introduced to the repository.
This includes but is not limited to:
- Adding or modifying scripts, tools, or the GUI
- Adding new test case fields or changing the schema
- Adding new subcomponents or Automate versions
- Changing folder structure or file organization
- Updating dependencies in requirements.txt
- Modifying CLI commands, arguments, or workflows

The README.md is the single source of truth for navigating and using this project.
Keep the repository structure diagram, field reference table, and usage instructions
in sync with the actual state of the codebase at all times.
